action.reasoning: Observation: empty workspace and no baseline yet. Analysis: need a fast end-to-end pipeline with offline predict support and immediate eval per instructions. Decision: implement a strong lightweight baseline using normalized inputs, latitude-weighted loss, periodic convolutions, and a residual predictor from the latest frame; train only a few epochs and submit eval to validate pipeline and measure runtime.
action.command: python train.py --epochs 4 --batch_size 64 --lr 2e-3 --hidden 96 --depth 8 --out checkpoints/baseline.pt && python predict.py --data_path /data --checkpoint checkpoints/best.pt --output local_test_output.json
